instances.title: Model-free reinforcement-learning policy execution
instances.admission_rationale: The frozen instance executes a learned action-value table. Whether table-based value comparison counts as reasoning is intentionally not decided at admission.
instances.formalization_boundary: Policy execution only; training, model construction, and online learning are excluded.

instances.title: Constraint propagation without search
instances.admission_rationale: The instance repeatedly applies deterministic local consistency rules. Whether such propagation is reasoning without branching or explanation is left unresolved.
instances.formalization_boundary: One finite arc-consistency episode; search, explanation generation, and backtracking are excluded.
